title: Resinous Quick Canadian Applesauce Pudding
description: A quick and easy Canadian dessert featuring applesauce, with a resinous and shattering texture, suitable for Jain-friendly diets. This pudding is made with simple ingredients and can be prepared in no time.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, whisk together the applesauce, maple syrup, cornstarch, lemon juice, vanilla extract, and salt.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, or until the pudding has thickened.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the coconut oil.
Let the pudding cool to room temperature, then cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
Just before serving, give the pudding a good stir and scoop into individual serving cups.
Serve chilled, garnished with a sprinkle of salt if desired.
